other_observers: Virginia Maynard on the 28th, and with Brandon Percival and V. Maynard on the 29th; Virginia Maynard - she also saw a 4th bird on 30 November the last day they were seen until 2 appeared on 26 December.
specific_location: Maynards residence, 1320 Indian Oaks Place, Manitou Springs.
description: Small finch with red cap, small conical mostly yellow bill, with brown back with dark vertical streaks. Black on chin surrounded by red. A male present had red extending onto the flanks and breast. Dark broad streaks were on the flanks of all three birds. Brown ear coverts with frosty face. Tail short, undertail coverts with streaks. Wings dark brown with large white wingbar and white-edged wings and tertials. Lower belly white.Behaviors: Feeding on black oil sunflowers at feeders and on the ground. Also perched in conifer waiting to come down to feed.Call: none heardPlumage: basic
photographer: Photographer: bill maynard, bill maynard, bill maynard, bill maynard
